name: caliper-workspace
description: Hyperledger Caliper Benchmark for BCMS — Blockchain Certificate Management System

scripts.test: echo 'Use: npx caliper launch manager --caliper-workspace . --caliper-networkconfig networks/networkConfig.yaml --caliper-benchconfig benchmarks/benchConfig.yaml --caliper-flow-only-test'
scripts.validate-config: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); ['workload/issueCertificate.js','workload/verifyCertificate.js','workload/queryAllCertificates.js','workload/revokeCertificate.js'].forEach(f=>{const m=require('./'+f);if(typeof m.createWorkloadModule!=='function'){throw new Error(f+' invalid');} console.log('✅',f)});"
